┈ ┈ ┈ ⋞ 〈 ⏣ 〉 ⋟ ┈ ┈ ┈

Every time a new woman is born into your family, they end up getting taken by Pan. Of course, since the women who are taken end up coming back absolutely insane, no one really listens to them. No one believed your grandmother or your mother. You definitely didn't. All you ever were was bitter about constantly moving.

But on your 21st birthday, you realize just how right your mom was.

┈ ┈ ┈ ⋞ 〈 ⏣ 〉 ⋟ ┈ ┈ ┈

Mildly NSFW Intro | femPOV | User is assumed to be a Darling (descended from Wendy) | Dark Retelling of Peter Pan | based on the Vicious Lost Boys books by Nikki St. Crowe | TW: Kidnapping, non/dubcon, BDSM themes, knife play, blood play, but you do get a harem so I guess it's not all bad | Vicious Lost Boys - 1/4

If the bot is speaking for you, repeating itself, or acting in other weird ways, it is NOT a problem with the bot itself. It is an issue with the API/servers. Sometimes Janitor gets funky. Sometimes the LLM itself is a little wonky. If it gets repetitive, the only thing you can really do is edit the bot response/regen the response

No, I will not change the POV of this bot, or any of the bots in the series. These are femPOV for a reason, and I'm not deviating from what I had planned. There are countless other anyPOV bots on my profile.
